name: Mexican Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 can (1 lb) fat-free vegetarian refried beans
1 cup chunky salsa (any degree of heat you prefer)
1 cup fat-free or 1% fat cottage cheese
1 cup shredded fat-free (or low-fat if desired) cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the lasagna noodles according to package directions.
2. Rinse and drain the cooked noodles.
3. In a small saucepan, mix the beans and salsa and heat over medium flame until runny.
4. Place a small amount of the bean mixture in the bottom of an 8 or 9-inch baking dish.
5. Layer four or five lasagna noodles over the dish (save any extra noodle length for later).
6. Spread half of the bean/salsa mix on top of the noodles, then add half of the cottage cheese and some cheddar cheese.
7. Top with more noodles, the remaining bean/salsa mix, and cottage cheese, followed by additional cheddar cheese.
8. Bake in a microwave at medium-high for 10 minutes (uncovered) or in an oven at 350 degrees for 30 minutes until hot and bubbly.
This recipe is really good and much easier than it sounds. Layering lasagna can be a bit tricky, but this method works well!
